title: clinopodium chinense
intro: Clinopodium chinense, also known as Chinese clinopodium or Chinese calamint, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its essential oils, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Clinopodium chinense include alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as relieving headaches and fever. In traditional herbal medicine, Clinopodium chinense is often prepared as a tea or infused oil to be used topically, with the dried leaves and flowers also being used in herbal remedies and supplements.
